channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Here are the five big takeaways from Kevin Warsh's first meeting as Fed chairman
item.description: The Federal Reserve and Chairman Kevin Warsh on Wednesday followed the script on interest rates closely.

item.title: Trump and Iran's President Pezeshkian sign memorandum aimed to end war
item.description: President Trump earlier said at the G7 summit that the memorandum of understanding with Iran "might not be the kind of document that I should be signing."

item.title: Oil falls as International Energy Agency forecasts supply glut next year after U.S.-Iran deal
item.description: Oil declines as Mideast peace prospects rise following U.S.-Iran deal.

item.title: Why Wall Street banks and foreign borrowers are rushing to tap China’s cheap money
item.description: Foreign governments, Wall Street banks and multinational companies are flocking to China's panda bond market.

item.title: Treasury 2-year yield post-Fed spike 'exaggerated' or is there room for more? Strategists weigh in
item.description: Markets pushed up short-term Treasury yields after Kevin Warsh's first Fed meeting, though strategists disagreed on whether the move signals a lasting shift toward tighter policy.

item.title: India’s largest stock exchange files for IPO as mega-listings gather pace
item.description: India's largest stock exchange sets the ball rolling for mega IPOs this year as it files papers to go public.

item.title: Jeffrey Gundlach says Fed's Warsh is not going to be the 'easy money' chairman many hoped for
item.description: Gundlach said Warsh's stance reduces the risk of overly accommodative monetary policy that could reignite inflation and push longer-term borrowing costs higher.

item.title: Google Gemini co-lead Noam Shazeer leaves for OpenAI
item.description: Google's vice president of engineering and a co-leader of its Gemini AI models announced Wednesday he is leaving the company to join OpenAI.

item.title: China to return as a major oil buyer in August, JPMorgan says, naming its top stock picks
item.description: The pullback in oil imports by the world's largest oil importer has helped absorb the global energy shock and cap the surge in oil prices since the war began.

item.title: Defense contractors would be barred from buying back their stock in bill approved by Senate panel
item.description: A bill the Senate Armed Services Committee approved would prevent defense contractors from buying back their stock without Pentagon approval.

item.title: JetBlue to reduce Newark, LaGuardia footprint as it forges ahead in Fort Lauderdale
item.description: JetBlue is planning to cut some employee bases at Newark Liberty International Airport in New Jersey and tech bases at New York's LaGuardia Airport.

item.title: The private space race is spurring a luxury hotel land grab for Florida oceanfront property
item.description: The rise of the private space industry, with companies like SpaceX and Blue Origin, has spurred demand for commercial real estate on Florida's space coast.

item.title: Inside India newsletter: Anthropic curbs ignite AI debate in India — efforts 'too slow, way too small'
item.description: India's ambitions of becoming a global AI innovation powerhouse by building applications on top of foreign foundational models are being challenged.

item.title: Analysis: Chairman Kevin Warsh’s task forces are the key to understanding the new Fed
item.description: The new leader of the Fed left interest rates alone but made clear how he plans to rewire the central bank.

item.title: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: Stocks fell on Wednesday after the Federal Reserve's so-called "dot plot" suggested that an interest rate hike could be in the cards for 2026.

item.title: Financials have the market's deepest bench of near-breakouts
item.description: CNBC screened the S&P 500 for stocks trading close to 52-week highs that have not made new highs recently.

item.title: Chairman Warsh abstains from giving rate forecast as several members signal a hike in 2026
item.description: The median projection called for the federal funds rate to end 2026 at 3.8%, a quarter percentage point above the current target range.

item.title: 2-year Treasury yield rockets higher as many Fed officials signal possible hike this year
item.description: U.S. Treasury yields rose on Wednesday after the Fed held interest rates steady during Kevin Warsh's first policy meeting as chairman.

item.title: Chairman Warsh drastically alters Fed rate statement. Here's what's changed
item.description: This is a comparison of Wednesday's Federal Open Market Committee statement with the one issued after the Fed's previous policymaking meeting in April.

item.title: CME CEO Terrence Duffy says the exchange operator will sue CFTC over perpetual futures
item.description: Outgoing CME CEO Terrence Duffy said that the exchange operator will sue the CFTC over the agency’s decision to approve perpetual futures.

item.title: The market didn't like what it heard from the Fed and its new leader Kevin Warsh
item.description: The S&P 500 closed down 1.2%, as bond yields rose.

item.title: Can you get a loan for a wedding? The do's, don'ts and alternatives
item.description: You can take out a personal loan to finance your wedding, but follow these guidelines first.

item.title: Jim Cramer says this chipmaker is still a buy after soaring more than 200% this year
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer named Intel as his top stock pick, arguing that investors should focus on the company's future AI opportunities.

item.title: Fed holds interest rates steady: Here's what that means for credit cards, savings rates, mortgages and car loans
item.description: Here’s a look at how the Fed's June interest rate decision may affect your finances.

item.title: 'Passive' investors who dodged bitcoin are now forced to own SpaceX, which is three times more volatile
item.description: Many advisors and money-managers invested in index funds who will soon be owners of Elon Musk's astronomic ambitions

item.title: Fed holds rates steady, pares down statement to remove cutting bias
item.description: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released its interest rate decision.

item.title: Fed meeting recap: Warsh announces task forces to overhaul major Federal Reserve operations
item.description: The Federal Reserve’s rate decision on Wednesday marks the first one with Kevin Warsh at the helm.

item.title: Trump sabotages Senate bid to fast-track Clayton as DNI, committee scuttles hearing
item.description: Any delay, and continuation of acting DNI Bill Pulte in the role, is likely to endanger the reauthorization of a key U.S. intelligence authority.

item.title: CEOs of Anthropic and Google DeepMind call for U.S.-led AI coalition in meeting at G7
item.description: Tech leaders and heads of state, including President Donald Trump, joined a meeting about AI standards at the G7 Summit.

item.title: Allbirds continues AI pivot with name change and CEO hire, sending stock soaring
item.description: Allbirds became NewBird AI in April and said it would trade shoes for AI compute infrastructure.
